claims.falsifier: A correctly analyzed independent study with compatible design shows no effect or an opposite effect.
claims.next_action: Seek an independent replication before upgrading the claim beyond single-study support.
claims.permitted_inference: The included controlled study supports an association within its population and endpoint.
claims.text: The example intervention improved the prespecified outcome relative to control in the included study.
claims.uncertainty: Single-study evidence; external validity and independent replication remain unresolved.
